channel.title: cryptocurrency on Cédric Walter blog
channel.description: Recent content in cryptocurrency on Cédric Walter blog
channel.copyright: Reproduction without explicit permission is prohibited. All Rights Reserved. All photos remain copyright © their rightful owners. No copyright infringement is intended.

item.title: Cryptocurrency monitor with Unicorn HAT
item.description: Unicorn pHAT and HAT. 32 or 64 blinding ws2812 pixels for your Raspberry Pi. it is called Unicorn Hat because it does rainbows, really bright rainbows! ATTENTION: do not stare directly at the led without a sheet of paper on it. LED are REALLY bright! Shopping list You need obviously a [raspberry pi][1], ideally with WIFI build in if you don ’t like cables Raspberry Pi 1 is not supported by Unicorn Hat Raspberry pi 2 , dual core, will require an Ethernet cable, can still be found on ebay, graiglist.

item.title: Bitcoin And Ethereum price Ticker using Raspberry Pi and Display-O-Tron
item.description: How to monitor the Bitcoin and Ethereum price on a DisplayOTron LCD and any Raspberry PI! Shopping list You need obviously a raspberry pi, ideally with WIFI build in if you don ’t like cables PI Zero W Raspberry pi 1, single core, will require an Ethernet cable Raspberry pi 2 , dual core, will require an Ethernet cable Raspberry pi 3 or 4, a bit a shame to use this amount of power for that task, has built in WIFI A displayOTron (Shop – [Github][1]) Includes a 16×3 character LCD display, 6-zone RGB LED backlight, bar graph, and six capacitive touch buttons all in one slim package.
